name: vantage-skills
description: Vantage agent-skills: the orchestrator engine, its specialist sub-agents, and the portable optimizer.

plugins.name: vantage-orchestrator
plugins.description: Venture-agnostic orchestrator engine. Plans a mission into a wave-based DAG, deploys specialist sub-agents (researcher, ideation, implementation, website-build, auditor, frontend-tester) in parallel, gates each wave through the auditor, and runs autonomously under configurable autonomy and external-authority dials with run-budget stop conditions and a non-negotiable safety floor. Ships a portable optimizer skill.
